metadata.source: NRC Facility Info Finder, ConverDyn, Solstice Advanced Materials press releases
known_gaps: Exact current annual output not public
metadata.notes: Only commercial UF6 conversion facility in the United States. Ownership transferred from Honeywell to Solstice Advanced Materials (Nasdaq) October 2025.

properties.name: Metropolis Works
properties.notes: Only commercial UF6 conversion facility in the US. ~20% of global conversion capacity. $2B+ order backlog. Expanding output to >10,000 tonnes UF6 (~6,700 MTU) by 2026. Licensed capacity of 15,000 MTU/yr measures uranium feed; tonnes UF6 measures compound output including fluorine mass.
